name: Rock Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve baking powder in a little warm water.
2. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter with sugar and eggs until fluffy.
4. In a separate bowl, sift flour with cinnamon and cloves.
5. Slowly beat flour into butter and sugar mixture.
6. Add the dissolved baking powder.
7. Stir in raisins, dates, and nuts.
8. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 7-9 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
Yield: 4 dozen.
